title: FrontierBase | Turn spreadsheet answers into customer support when you are away
excerpt: Connect product, pricing, inventory, or policy tables, set response rules, and add a widget that answers from the rows FrontierBase finds. Test one dataset free.
content_html:
Connect product, pricing, inventory, or policy tables; choose the response rules;
and add a widget that answers from the rows FrontierBase retrieves.

Connect a spreadsheet, set response rules, and deploy a widget. Every reply points back to retrieved rows and the policy you chose.

Repetitive support, handled

Turn the same product, pricing, and policy answers into customer support that keeps working when you are offline.

Internal lookup without the hunt

Give your team chat or API access over Excel, CSV, and Google Sheets, with retrieved rows close enough to review before acting.

Evidence you can inspect

Each answer shows the source rows and the response rule it followed (tone, evidence, and safety) through a widget or REST API.

Connect Excel, CSV, or Google Sheets, set rules, then serve answers through a widget or API

1

Upload Excel/CSV & Connect Google Sheets

Import products, prices, inventory, and policies from Excel/CSV files or Google Sheets. Everything stays in its original table format, ready to retrieve by row.

2

Set Response Policy

Choose tone, evidence presentation, and safety rules. These policies are enforced on every generated answer.

3

Retrieve rows, then answer

Semantic and keyword search surface the rows that matter. The answer, those rows, and the active response rule are served via widget or REST API.

Source rows, missing-data handling, response rules, and a clear search boundary

Answers you can trace to a row

Every reply stays within the table rows that were found and the response rules you set.

Focused on Excel, CSV, and Google Sheets

Connect structured data such as products, prices, inventory, and policies directly through Excel, CSV, or Google Sheets.

Search limited to table rows

Answers use only the rows FrontierBase finds for the question, not a summary of the whole document.

Unsupported answers stay unsupported

When a field is missing from the retrieved rows, the reply leaves it out instead of inventing a value you can inspect later.

Use it where work already happens

Deploy through a web widget or REST API, with conversation context and policies applied consistently.

Keeps the conversation context

Previous requests and judgment criteria stay in context so follow-ups do not require re-explaining the same table.

Apply response rules

Tone, evidence display, and safety rules are applied to each reply so you can point back to the policy in force.

REST API & Chatbot Widget

Serve answers through a web widget or REST API without a heavy custom build.

Repetitive customer support first. The same tables can also cover internal lookup.

Customer support from your tables

Connect product, pricing, inventory, or policy spreadsheets and answer repeated customer questions through a widget—even when you are offline.

Stop searching the same spreadsheet

Give your team a chat or API interface over Excel, CSV, and Google Sheets, with the retrieved rows kept close enough to review before acting.

What usually changes after you connect tables, set rules, and add a widget.

Outcomes depend on your data and workflows.

Less repetitive support

Cut time spent re-answering the same spreadsheet questions from customers.

Faster rollout

Upload data, set policies, and embed a widget without heavy integration.

Reviewable answers

Inspect retrieved rows and enforced response policies before you act on a reply.

After your tables and rules are ready, choose a layout for the chatbot widget.

Test one dataset free

Connect a sample table, set response rules, and try a widget reply from your rows

blocks.html_en: Connect a sample table, set response rules, and try a widget reply from your rows

sentences.en: Connect a sample table, set response rules, and try a widget reply from your rows
sentences.zh: 连接示例表，设置响应规则，并尝试从您的行进行小部件回复

content_html_zh:
连接产品、定价、库存或政策表；选择响应规则；并添加一个从 FrontierBase 检索的行中进行回答的小部件。

连接电子表格、设置响应规则并部署小部件。 每个回复都指向检索到的行和您选择的策略。

重复支持，处理

将相同的产品、定价和政策答案转化为客户支持，在您离线时也能继续工作。

无需搜寻的内部查找

通过 Excel、CSV 和 Google Sheets 为您的团队提供聊天或 API 访问权限，检索到的行足够接近，以便在采取行动之前进行审查。

您可以检查的证据

每个答案都会通过小部件或 REST API 显示源行及其遵循的响应规则（语气、证据和安全性）。

连接 Excel、CSV 或 Google Sheets，设置规则，然后通过小部件或 API 提供答案

1

上传 Excel/CSV 并连接 Google 表格

从 Excel/CSV 文件或 Google 表格导入产品、价格、库存和政策。 一切都保持其原始表格格式，准备按行检索。

2

设置响应策略

选择语气、证据呈现和安全规则。 这些策略对每个生成的答案都强制执行。

3

检索行，然后回答

语义和关键字搜索显示重要的行。 答案、这些行和主动响应规则通过小部件或 REST API 提供。

源行、缺失数据处理、响应规则和清晰的搜索边界

您可以追踪到一行的答案

每个回复都保留在找到的表行和您设置的响应规则中。

专注于 Excel、CSV 和 Google Sheets

直接通过 Excel、CSV 或 Google Sheets 连接结构化数据，例如产品、价格、库存和政策。

搜索仅限于表行

答案仅使用 FrontierBase 为问题找到的行，而不是整个文档的摘要。

不支持的答案保持不支持

当检索到的行中缺少某个字段时，回复会忽略该字段，而不是创建一个可供稍后检查的值。

在已经工作的地方使用它

通过 Web 小部件或 REST API 进行部署，并一致应用对话上下文和策略。

保留对话上下文

先前的请求和判断标准保留在上下文中，因此后续操作不需要重新解释同一张表。

应用响应规则

语气、证据显示和安全规则适用于每个回复，以便您可以指出现行的政策。

REST API 和聊天机器人小部件

通过 Web 小部件或 REST API 提供答案，无需大量自定义构建。

首先是重复的客户支持。 相同的表还可以涵盖内部查找。

在您的餐桌上提供客户支持

连接产品、定价、库存或政策电子表格，并通过小部件回答重复的客户问题 - 即使您处于离线状态。

停止搜索同一个电子表格

通过 Excel、CSV 和 Google Sheets 为您的团队提供聊天或 API 界面，检索到的行保持足够接近以便在采取行动之前进行审查。

连接表、设置规则和添加小部件后通常会发生变化。

结果取决于您的数据和工作流程。

减少重复支持

减少重新回答客户相同电子表格问题所花费的时间。

更快的推出

上传数据、设置策略并嵌入小部件，无需大量集成。

可审核的答案

在对回复采取行动之前，检查检索到的行和强制执行的响应策略。

准备好表格和规则后，为聊天机器人小部件选择布局。

免费测试一个数据集

连接示例表，设置响应规则，并尝试从您的行进行小部件回复
